languages.text: {n}Иждриг стремительно подается вперед, зажав в руке верный нож, но вдруг останавливается.{/n} "Будь я проклят... Себериан..."
{n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг стремительно подается вперед, зажав в руке верный нож, но вдруг останавливается.{/n} "Будь я проклят... Себериан..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

{n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig macht mit seinem Messer in der Hand einen Satz nach vorne, hält dann aber plötzlich inne.{/n} "Ich will verdammt sein ... Seberian ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig macht mit seinem Messer in der Hand einen Satz nach vorne, hält dann aber plötzlich inne.{/n} "Ich will verdammt sein ... Seberian ..."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig se jette en avant, le poing serré sur son fidèle couteau, mais s'arrête aussitôt.{/n} « Bon sang... Seberian... »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig se jette en avant, le poing serré sur son fidèle couteau, mais s'arrête aussitôt.{/n} « Bon sang... Seberian... »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig se lanza hacia delante, con su leal cuchillo en mano, pero se detiene abruptamente.{/n} «Que me parta un rayo... Seberian...».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig se lanza hacia delante, con su leal cuchillo en mano, pero se detiene abruptamente.{/n} «Que me parta un rayo... Seberian...».

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, güvenilir bıçağı elinde öne atıp sonra aniden duruyor.{/n} "Kahretsin... Seberian..."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig, güvenilir bıçağı elinde öne atıp sonra aniden duruyor.{/n} "Kahretsin... Seberian..."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格握着趁手的短刀猛冲上前，突然又停了下来。{/n}“真见鬼……是塞贝里安……”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lunges forward, his trusted knife in hand, then suddenly stops.{/n} "Damn me... Seberian..."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格握着趁手的短刀猛冲上前，突然又停了下来。{/n}“真见鬼……是塞贝里安……”

languages.text: {n}イズドリックは信頼の剣を手に突進するが、突然立ち止まった。{/n}「 呪われた... セベリアン... 」
